title: 2026 Grammy Predictions: Record of the Year
text: According to Total Music Awards' analysis, "Luther" by Kendrick Lamar & SZA is predicted to win Record of the Year at the 2026 Grammy Awards. The publication identified these major nominees in the category: "DtMF" by Bad Bunny, "Manchild" by Sabrina Carpenter, "Anxiety" by Doechii, "Wildflower" by Billie Eilish, "Abracadabra" by Lady Gaga, "Luther" by Kendrick Lamar & SZA, "The Subway" by Chappell Roan, "APT." by Rosé & Bruno Mars. The article notes this is "a very evenly-matched group" with multiple strong contenders. The prediction reasoning emphasizes that while "Bruno Mars almost never loses at the Grammys" and "Bad Bunny is the superstar of the moment," the collaboration between Kendrick Lamar and SZA ultimately has the edge. The track's status as a significant hit and the historical success of both artists at the Grammys factored into this prediction.
